name: Sliding metal Under the Sink Kitchen Organizer - Brightroom™
description:
Utilize the space under your sink for organization with the Sliding Metal Under-the-Sink Kitchen Organizer from Brightroom™. This kitchen organizer features a wired design with an open top and front cutout for easy organization of your cleaning essentials, brushes and more. Made of metal, it easily slides under the sink to help keep the contents organized out of sight.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
